name: André Tessier
background: Mr. Tessier has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held various executive positions and has been involved in several mineral discoveries. He is a Professional Geologist and holds a B.Sc. in Geology from the University of Montreal and an M.Sc. in Economic Geology from Queen's University.

commpanies.name: Delta Resources Limited
commpanies.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director
